entry.title: What if the hunter kissed his prey?
entry.summary:
Author: Wing1940

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,975Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: The hunter set out to kill a dragon. He came back with a fiancé, an egg, and a lot of questions. — Or: what happens when a lonely dragon gets kissed by a grumpy hunter who thought he was kissing a sleeping princess.

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 80,235Chapters: 13/16Kudos: 561

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.title: beast of blood
entry.summary:
Author: thearkhamknightmare

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,341Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 8

Summary: We can have a conversation, hunter," the vampire in front of him says, still lurking in the shadows. Jason hears the soft footfalls of the vampire's feet getting closer and closer; most people would be scared—terrified even—at the thought of being stalked like prey, but Jason invites it with something that Jason can't place. The feeling in his gut is unfamiliar but his hand is still gripping the stake at his hip, one that gets knocked out of his hand as the vampire gets close. "Ah, ah, ah," the vampire chides, suddenly as visibile as ever, "Like humans, hunter. I won't hurt you unless you give me a reason. And that stake is a reason for me to hurt you." or: day one - hunter!jason and magical creature!dick

entry.title: I can't help falling in love with you
entry.summary:
Author: borkbork52

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,285Chapters: 7/15Kudos: 234

Summary: Tim returns home after a Bad Time™ with Bernard thinking he's worthless only to discover just how much his family loves him (and then some) instead. A deep dive into consensual polycule Batfamily where the boys fall in love, seduce their dad, and make Gotham look good doing it.

entry.title: Scary Monsters (And Super Creeps)
entry.summary:
Author: mermaidautopsy

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,640Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: 'I'm not sure which I should preform first; an exorcism, or pest removal' John grumbled to no one but himself, flicking his lighter back to life and kissing it to the end of his last, crumpled cigarette. Chas, characterisically unimpressed with the warlock's lax attitude towards the case, grumbled something no doubt vulgarly worded to himself out of John's earshot in return. A third voice; calm, collected, and to John's ears, far too distinctly Gothamite for his liking, entered the conversation without waiting to ask either of the gentlemen for permission. 'If you let me take out the vermin, there won't be any need for your cheap magic tricks' the Red Hood spoke through his visor, exiting the shadows that pervaded the entrenched canal walkway, stalking towards the two men where they stood, hands shoved in their pockets, bickering under a half-dead streetlamp at the water's edge. 'Well our kid, Chas and I, we can't take you up on that most generous offer of yours. See, we've already come so far out here as to freeze our arses off, might as well let us finish the job' John shot back, puffing up smoke and steam alike as he offered the young vigilante a pointed glare 'In summery; fuck off'.

entry.title: that color I saw with you, Was just simply too beautiful
entry.summary:
Author: rainiswriting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,511Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: It always started with a plan going rogue, a misstep, a miscalculation that made everything fall apart. Contrary to popular belief, the bats could still make these mistakes that could cost a life. Luckily, in this scenario, it wasn't a life that was being threatened, but someone's dignity, which could be seen as worse. “Next is a rare and delicate item that’s been leered upon for years. His beauty is unmatched, with legs that could go back that didn’t make you question on how he does in bed!”

entry.title: Worship at the Altar That is You
entry.summary:
Author: midnight_madness0615

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,090Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: The kissing and touching were one thing. Jason just wanted to help him feel a little human again.This was above Jason’s paygrade. He didn’t know what this was but he wasn’t going to encourage it, especially since they haven’t actually talked. There was no real “yes or no” conversation in terms of this. Dick wasn’t consenting to this. Hell, neither of them consented to any of this. It just was. It was their reality.Now, though, Jason realized he was faced with a choice. Jason could throw them over that line and send them tumbling down a cliff into brand spanking new territory.If they could bring each other a bit of comfort in a vast sea of suffering was that really so wrong?

entry.title: The Fifteen Instances of Captivity
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,408Chapters: 11/15Kudos: 680

Summary: Jason Todd, Robin, or the newest addition to the Titans, is now finding himself the captive of a team of mercenaries and one mysterious Renegade. A series of images & blurbs representing fifteen instances of Robin's captivity, connecting to be a linear story. 1-The Captor(s)2-Water3-Singing Voice The Sound of Music4-Failed Escape Attempt5-Homesickness6-Thermometer7-The Clock8-Lost Key9-Pure Oxygen Chloroform10-Near Asphyxiation 11-Fast-Acting Poison

entry.title: The Stray
entry.summary:
Author: Rustycrunch

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,719Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Gotham does not forgive, and it does not forget. Neither does Samira Jimenez. When her father, a district attorney who dared to believe in a reformed city, is murdered, Samira is left with nothing but grief, a coin she cannot place, and a dangerous name whispered between criminals in the dark: Red Hood. Trained in the shadows by a mentor who taught her everything except how to trust her, Samira trades the law for something deeper. She trades her pain for answers. She trades her fear for the truth. But Gotham's truths are never simple, and the man she has been hunting is not the monster she imagined. In a city where every light casts a longer shadow, Samira must decide what justice really means and how much of herself she is willing to lose to find it.

entry.title: Aquila
entry.summary:
Author: Nightshade_Nectar

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,088Chapters: 4/6Kudos: 196

Summary: Dick blinks. "You want me," he tilts his throat to better bare the purpling handprint to Jason's sight, "to pass this off as a hickey?" Jason just huffs, tapping the grainy picture on the tabloid's cover. "No, Dick. I'm saying you could pass this off as a collection of hickeys. Unless you have a better idea, that is."

entry.title: Common Grounds
entry.summary:
Author: MewSefet

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,578Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 283

Summary: What happens when you accidently start dating your son's English teacher? When Dick and Jason find themselves pushed together on a rainy day in their usual coffee shop, neither of them expect their lives are already intertwined. How casual flirting and mutual interest turns into dating, turns into an identity reveal that neither of them expect, but should have figured out earlier. Eg. the Detective!Dick Grayson/Teacher!Jason Todd fic that no one asked for. Including Jason is Damian's teacher, and Damian is 80% Dick's son and identity shenanigans in a Civillian!AU.

entry.title: bottoms up (let's forget tonight)
entry.summary:
Author: 002yb

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,850Chapters: 11/14Kudos: 563

Summary: Life has a funny way of screwing people and Jason has always looked best fucked over. It’s why it isn’t all that surprising that he wakes up from a blackout stupor to the staggering realization that he’s slept with his not-quite-brother and crush-for-forever. He expects it to be a big deal. It's not.
